posts.copy:
Giant wooden trolls are hiding in botanical gardens across the country.

16-50 feet tall. Built entirely from recycled pallets. Each with a unique name and backstory.

The numbers don't lie:
• 1.26M visitors at Morton Arboretum
• 55% were first-time visitors at Atlanta
• Zero waste construction philosophy

Currently at South Coast Botanic Garden, Lauritzen Gardens, and The Wild Center.

Perfect family adventure. Educational for school groups. Inspiring for art lovers.

TrollMap.com shows all global locations.

#ThomasDamboTrolls #BotanicalGardens #FamilyFun #SustainableArt #RecycledArt #TreasureHunt #EducationalTravel #WeekendPlans #ArtInNature #OutdoorAdventure
